nodes.label: Auto Route Discovery Pattern
nodes.rationale: Scans directory for *.routes.js files and mounts them dynamically. Chosen to allow adding routes without editing index.js. Trade-off: less explicit, load order not guaranteed, but zero-config for small growing project.

nodes.label: Underscore-Prefix Unused Parameter Convention
nodes.rationale: Prefix _ on params like _req, _res signals intentionally unused. Silences ESLint no-unused-vars rule without disabling it. Communicates intent to readers.

nodes.label: Vite Manual Chunk Code Splitting
nodes.rationale: react-vendor and chart-vendor split so chart.js only downloads on routes that render charts. React stays cacheable across deploys.
